introSection: Zéphyr is a steel roller coaster currently under construction at Parc Ange Michel in Saint Martin de Landelles, Normandy, France. The ride was set to open in 2025 but has been delayed due to "significant unforeseen administrative procedures".
fullText: Zéphyr is a steel roller coaster currently under construction at Parc Ange Michel in Saint Martin de Landelles, Normandy, France. The ride was set to open in 2025 but has been delayed due to "significant unforeseen administrative procedures".
